response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:39: Identified as instrumental intro/setup. 2. 00:39-04:46: Detected vocal performance of '夢幻' by Tokoyami Towa and Mori Calliope. Identified composer MY FIRST STORY / CHIMERAZ via on-screen text. 3. Used search tool to find Japanese lyrics for '夢幻'. 4. 04:46-05:04: Identified as post-performance talk/greeting.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live stage performance of the song 'Mugen' (夢幻) by performers Tokoyami Towa and Mori Calliope, followed by a short post-performance talk.

scenes.description: Introductory scene of the two performers on a live concert stage with instrumental music playing before the song starts.
Full performance of the song 'Mugen' (夢幻) by Tokoyami Towa and Mori Calliope on stage.

言い訳に聞こえた理由は
儚い未来手繰った弱さ
それを強さとはき違えている

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
To you, who don't know the meaning of eternity,
It's time to show you the answer.
Towards the end of the spiral that leads to the dream,
The reason I heard, which sounded like an excuse,
Is the weakness of reeling in a fleeting future,
Mistaking that for strength.
I hate it, I hate it,
It's ugly, it's ugly,
Black, black, like a moon-hiding darkness,
Stagnant, heart,
If only you didn't exist,
Swaying, swaying like a flower,
Passing on the will,
Stealing, stealing like a storm,
Tearing my heart apart,
To you, who don't know the meaning of eternity,
It's time to show you the answer.
Who is waiting at the end of the spiral that leads to the dream?
I drank the fate I was born with,
I remembered the number of names I bore,
The emotions that burn my heart until it festers,
I hate it, I hate it,
It's ugly, it's ugly,
Anger that divides the world,
Burning, heart,
If only you didn't exist,
Swaying, swaying like a flower,
Passing on the will,
Stealing, stealing like a storm,
Tearing my heart apart,
To you, who don't know the meaning of eternity,
It's time to show you the answer.
Who is waiting at the end of the spiral that leads to the dream?
I tilted my ear to the demon's cry,
It's the end for everything that dwells in this body,
It's the end for everything that dwells in this body,
I'm weak for entrusting the dream to others,
The radiance of life is through many cycles,
The flicker of prayer illuminates the setting sun,
Bearing a thousand nights in this body,
Forcing an answer,
Withering away, withering away,
Tearing flowers in the dream's night,
Connecting, connecting,
Sowing seeds in the storm...
(Note: This is a representative translation of the lyrics.)

scenes.description: Post-performance talk and greeting by Tokoyami Towa.
